activities.name: Soccer
activities.reasoning: Mild temperatures and good air quality make for excellent field conditions. UV is moderate — consider morning sessions.

activities.name: Running
activities.reasoning: Cool morning temps ideal for distance runs. Afternoon heat pushes effort into high-stress zone after 1 PM.

activities.name: Cycling
activities.reasoning: Light NW winds provide natural cooling on trails. Midday UV warrants sunscreen and hydration stops.

activities.name: Walking
activities.reasoning: Comfortable throughout the day with brief afternoon warmth. Evening strolls along the waterfront are ideal.

activities.name: Fishing
activities.reasoning: Morning bite window aligns with calm winds. Afternoon gusts may affect casting from open shoreline.

activities.name: Boating
activities.reasoning: Moderate winds suitable for casual boating. Experienced sailors may prefer stronger afternoon gusts.

activities.name: Photography
activities.reasoning: Golden hour lighting at dawn and dusk. Partly cloudy skies add dramatic depth to landscape shots.

activities.name: Outdoor Events
activities.reasoning: Good conditions for community gatherings before noon. Schedule shade and hydration for afternoon events.
